arts.ttl: Why PSG and the San Antonio Spurs have struck a partnership
arts.sum: Ligue 1 giants PSG and NBA franchise the San Antonio Spurs are set to take advantage of the NBA Paris Games to strike a deal that will see the two teams work in partnership going ahead. “Paris Saint-Germain is thrilled to collaborate with the San Antonio Spurs, a team that shares our dedication to excellence, innovation, and community engagement,” PSG CEO Victoriano Melero said.
Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta says his side were "outstanding" against Tottenham as they moved to within four points of Premier League leaders Liverpool with victory in the north London derby.
Match of the Day pundits Micah Richards and Alan Shearer discuss how Arsenal beat a "passive" Tottenham Hotspur 2-1 in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Return to Everton an 'absolute whirlwind' - Moyes
arts.sum: Everton head coach David Moyes says his return to Goodison Park has been a "whirlwind" as he suffers a 0-1 defeat against Aston Villa in his first game back in charge.

arts.ttl: Sunday PL Predictions: Everton to pile pressure on Ange
arts.sum: Our betting expert Jones Knows provides his insight across Sunday's Premier League card where he sees more misery for Ange Postecoglou at Spurs.

arts.ttl: Dele Alli new club confirmed with former Tottenham Hotspur star set to sign 18-month contract
arts.sum: Former Tottenham Hotspur talent Dele Alli will reportedly sign for Como FC on Sunday having, trained with the team managed by Cesc Fabregas as a free agent to begin 2025. After his exit from Goodison Park, Dele began training with the Como with a view of potentially earning a contract with the Serie A side, who are currently managed by former Arsenal and Chelsea midfielder Fabregas.

arts.ttl: Bissouma and Johnson Everton wait in Tottenham injury news and return dates
arts.sum: Timo Werner joined some of his teammates on the injury table at the beginning of the week and now there are question marks hanging over Yves Bissouma and Brennan Johnson's fitness ahead of Sunday's game at Everton . Return date: Going on Postecoglou's comments about a possible return for Vicario at the end of February, Spurs' final game that month is at home to Manchester City on Wednesday, February 26.

arts.ttl: Tottenham still face Ange Postecoglou transfer nightmare in worst-case squad scenario this week
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou knows that the Tottenham squad he currently has available will have to get him through the next round of the Europa League. Albeit unlikely, Spurs know that anything other than two points from their remaining games will leave them open to heading out.

arts.ttl: Former Spurs midfielder Brooke dies aged 64
arts.sum: Garry Brooke, who twice was part of FA Cup-winning teams at Tottenham Hotspur, dies aged 64.

arts.ttl: Tottenham offered 24-year-old winger with “magnificent technical qualities”
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have been offered the chance to sign the AC Milan winger Noah Okafor. The 24-year-old has struggled for regular gametime at the Italian club this season and he needs to move on in search of regular playing time. He was linked with a move to Tottenham a few months ago. Spurs could provide […] The post Tottenham offered 24-year-old winger with “magnificent technical qualities” appeared first on CaughtOffside.
